chain.thought: Explanation: Reviewing the season premiere months shows only Season 6 premiered in September (the ninth month). All other seasons premiered in March or October, which are not the ninth month. Therefore, Season 6 is the only installment that premiered in the ninth month.

judge_thought:
Explanation: The ninth month is September. Checking the season premiere dates:
- Season 1: March (3rd month)
- Season 2: October (10th month)
- Season 3: October (10th month)
- Season 4: October (10th month)
- Season 5: October (10th month)
- Season 6: September 6, 2010 (9th month)
- Season 7: October (10th month)

Season 6 is the only installment that premiered in the ninth month; all others did not. Thus the Prediction Answer "season 6" matches the unique case described.
